domain: Hungarian Csango folk-song tradition (Moldavia eastern Romania, Hungarian-speaking Catholic minority): village fono Spinning Room nightly gathering for collective singing + ballad-learning + dance; archaic medieval ballads + Latin-liturgical + devotional; senior-singer-led + junior-listener-repeat progression; long-form ballads about love and life; preserved by Bartok/Kodaly/Lajtha 20th-c collection campaigns
specific_mechanism: CSANGO-FONO-COLLECTIVE-BALLAD-CURRICULUM: collective interleaved-generation training + senior-junior progression + ballad-bank fixed-repertoire + new-improvise senior-consensus gate + Bartok-collection augmentation cycle. (1) Fono shared training session: K-student LLMs train collectively in single session; each student hears interleaved generation from peers (cross-attention across students). (2) Senior-junior progression: K_senior senior LLMs (curated higher-quality) act as lead-singers + K_junior junior LLMs start in listen+repeat phase and gradually contribute; per-student status promoted when validation > tau. (3) Ballad-bank fixed-repertoire: frozen-corpus of N_ballad canonical reference ballads; junior students must reproduce these ≥ tau_repro before allowed to attempt new content. (4) New-line improvisation gate: when junior produces novel content, accept only if K_senior_consensus seniors score ≥ tau_quality (multi-senior consensus cross-validation). (5) Long-form ballad emphasis: training reward biased toward long-coherent multi-stanza output rather than short snippets. (6) Bartok-collection augmentation pass: periodic high-capacity collector LLM extracts highest-quality novel outputs from K-student population to augment ballad-bank for next training cycle (analog of 20th-c collection campaigns). (7) Differs from R464 ARNIS stick-cycle (drill cycle, no collective) + R483 JIEQI-24-STAGE-CURRICULUM (24-stage cyclical, no collective fono) + R496 GRIOT-HEREDITARY-DISTILL (hereditary distillation, no senior-consensus gate + no ballad-bank) + R508 PENCAK-SILAT-GRADE-UNLOCK by collective fono interleaved-generation + senior-junior consensus-gated promotion + ballad-bank fixed-repertoire + Bartok-style collection augmentation.
llm_application: CSANGO-FONO-COLLECTIVE-BALLAD-CURRICULUM K-student fono collective interleaved-generation training + senior-junior progression (K_senior lead + K_junior listen-repeat-contribute) + N_ballad fixed-repertoire canonical-target reproduction prerequisite + new-improvise K_senior_consensus quality-gate + long-ballad reward bias + Bartok-collection high-capacity-extractor augmentation cycle. Differs from R407. R410. R432 SONGLINE training-method. R446 OTEA. R458 AIKIDO. R464 ARNIS. R483 JIEQI-24-STAGE. R496 GRIOT-HEREDITARY (closest — hereditary distillation, no collective fono + no senior-consensus gate). R508 PENCAK-SILAT-GRADE-UNLOCK (closest — tiered grade, no collective + no ballad-bank). Differs from Curriculum Learning + CSCL Code-Switching + CollabLLM + Multi-Agent Debate by collective fono interleaved + senior-junior progression + ballad-bank canonical-target + senior-consensus gate + Bartok augmentation. Differs by COLLECTIVE FONO + SENIOR-JUNIOR PROGRESSION + BALLAD-BANK + SENIOR-CONSENSUS GATE + BARTOK AUGMENTATION.
novelty_claim: Curriculum Learning + CSCL + CollabLLM + Multi-Agent Debate + Self-Distillation literature cover curriculum + collaboration + distillation space. CSANGO-FONO-COLLECTIVE-BALLAD-CURRICULUM adds (a) collective fono shared-session interleaved-generation + (b) senior-junior progression with consensus-gate promotion + (c) ballad-bank fixed-repertoire canonical-target + (d) Bartok-collection augmentation cycle. Recombination — borderline lookup.
